headline: Honk Strengthens Leadership Team and Board as It Builds the Next Generation of Roadside Assistance
summary: CHICAGO, July 10, 2026--Honk Technologies, a leading technology platform for roadside assistance and accident management, today announced several key leadership additions as the company continues to build on its momentum following its recent acquisition by Frontenac and transaction with CurbsideSOS.

headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains Outperform on Allstate, Raises Price Target to $240
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Oliver Wintermantel   maintains Allstate (NYSE:ALL) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $225 to $240.
